name: otel-lab-frontend
description: Raw OpenTelemetry browser RUM/EUM client for the OTel Observability Lab. No vendor wrapper.
note: Versions are indicative as of mid-2026 — run `npm outdated` and align the @opentelemetry/* core packages (api/sdk/exporter/instrumentation) to one compatible release cycle before building, the same discipline VERSIONS.md applies to the backend SDK.
